ddls:
CREATE TABLE "verification_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification check */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the verification check (e.g., Verification) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the verification check (e.g., Conformance) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the verification check (e.g., Value, Relational) */,
  "instance" TEXT /* Instance of the verification check (e.g., a. Data values conform to internal formatting constraints.) */,
  "cdm_test" TEXT /* CDM test code (e.g., FIELD_LEVEL.CDM_DATATYPE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the verification check */,
  "compute_statistic" TEXT /* Compute statistic for the verification check (e.g., Number and percent of CDM fields that are not the wiki-specified datatype) */,
  "field_level_threshold" TEXT /* Field-level threshold for the verification check (e.g., No, Yes) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the verification check (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the verification check (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the verification check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the verification check was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the verification check */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the verification check was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., EHR System, Clinical Research Database) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., EHR, Research) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person for the data source */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the data source */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification result */,
  "check_id" INTEGER /* ID of the verification check */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the verification check was run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the verification check (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "result_statistic" TEXT /* Result statistic from the verification check (e.g., 5% of fields are not the correct datatype) */,
  "threshold_breached" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the threshold was breached */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the verification result */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User who reviewed the verification result */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the verification result was reviewed */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the verification result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the verification result was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the verification result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the verification result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_verification_results_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_verification_results_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_id") REFERENCES verification_checks ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_check_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field-level verification result */,
  "check_id" INTEGER /* ID of the verification check */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the verification check was run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the verification check (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "result_statistic" TEXT /* Result statistic from the verification check (e.g., 5% of records with incorrect concept_id domain) */,
  "threshold_breached" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the threshold was breached */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the field-level verification result */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User who reviewed the field-level verification result */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field-level verification result was reviewed */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the field-level verification result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field-level verification result was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the field-level verification result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field-level verification result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_check_results_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_id") REFERENCES verification_checks ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user (e.g., Alice Johnson) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user (e.g., alice.johnson@example.com) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Data Steward, Quality Analyst, Admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
